notableEvents.label: Bryson Stott GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bryson Stott grounds into a double play, second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr. to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Alec Bohm out at 2nd. Bryson Stott out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Bryce Harper GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bryce Harper grounds into a double play, second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr. to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Kyle Schwarber out at 2nd. Bryce Harper out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Edmundo Sosa plunked
notableEvents.detail: Edmundo Sosa hit by pitch. Justin Crawford to 2nd.
